seeds.text: Airborne asphalt lane: the street peels off the road in one long ribbon and becomes the lane Tina flies along, an elevated road of flying asphalt skin
seeds.stimulus: trunk f002; license: world is full of unnoticed seams

seeds.text: Patchwork sky-canopy: every peeled skin in the neighborhood (car roof, awnings, pool cover) knits itself into one parade-balloon-scale parachute rigged by the lychee crew
seeds.stimulus: trunk f002; license: skins in the air raft together

seeds.text: Peeled things lighten: once fully peeled, the whole neighborhood floats a few feet off the ground; only the unpeeled stays down. The Uber driver declines to be peeled and stays grounded, holding just the steering wheel
seeds.stimulus: trunk f002; license: peeled = fresher = lighter

seeds.text: Cost and button: trip-completed ding on the driver's phone as his car flies away in pieces; the talk radio keeps playing from the peeled roof-coil overhead. He sighs
seeds.stimulus: trunk f002; dials event 9 vs driver 1

seeds.text: Glass-jelly street: at the moment of the peel the houses go transparent like jelly, a whole street of visible glowing interiors, everyone seen mid-snack like a display case
seeds.stimulus: BEAKER: transparent wall

seeds.text: Saturation titration: each centimeter of peel unwound saturates the world one tick; a visible color gauge climbs the streetlights and the sunset like a thermometer filling. Stop peeling and it holds
seeds.stimulus: BEAKER: graduated markings

seeds.text: Decanted sunset: the peeled sky has a pouring lip; the sunset decants into the street like syrup from the world's rim, filling the neighborhood waist-deep in liquid dusk
seeds.stimulus: BEAKER: pouring lip

seeds.text: The world simmers under its skin: peeled patches release slow candy-colored bubbles that rise and set into gummy balloons; the neighborhood percolates
seeds.stimulus: BEAKER: sits over flame

seeds.text: Litmus front: the instant the peel completes, a color-change front sweeps the street and everything airborne (rain, pollen, exhaust) precipitates as falling candy sugar
seeds.stimulus: BEAKER: titration threshold

seeds.text: The peel-holder: one small panicked lychee gummy whose only job is holding the peel end, dragged skyward, meeping
seeds.stimulus: BEAKER: Beaker the Muppet

seeds.text: Decalcomania window: Tina presses the fresh peel against the car window and lifts it away; the glass now holds a riper painted double of the world outside, and the print is the portal to the next scene
seeds.stimulus: cascade from f048 decalcomania

seeds.text: The window does the traveling: one location, the back seat; Tina peels below frame while the world outside the window silently cycles through sunset, islands, petal-snow, back to street. First bite snaps it back to normal. The car never moves
seeds.stimulus: cage: no hands / one location / silent

seeds.text: Stadium time-lapse in one bite: Raul mid-peel below frame at the top of the bleachers; the crowd silently empties, refills, empties, seasons blur around the two of them; when he bites, it is still the same second of game time
seeds.stimulus: cage: no hands / one location / silent

seeds.text: The gummy contains the car: macro on the lychee as its skin lifts open, and inside the opened gummy is the back seat with a tiny Tina in it, looking up out of the candy
seeds.stimulus: cage: one location = inside the candy

seeds.text: Sun-peeled: the gummy sits on the armrest in a sunbeam and the sun peels it by itself, slowly, the way sun lifts old stickers; as it opens, the light in the car turns pink and thick like juice. It peels itself for whoever waits
seeds.stimulus: cage: no hands; lineage f052 f059 delay ads

seeds.text: The world holds its breath: mid-peel, everything that makes noise politely stops - traffic, radio, dogs, birds pause mid-air - and sound returns all at once with the bite
seeds.stimulus: cage: the impossible thing is silent

seeds.text: The gummy peels the world: the little peeled lychee reaches out and peels the street back like the skin of an enormous fruit; underneath, the street is juicy fruit-flesh, a glistening cross-section canyon
seeds.stimulus: PERMUTE f003: giant hand peels car -> gummy peels world

seeds.text: The candy eats the scene: instead of the camera diving into Meg's mouth, the whole stadium funnels silently into the grape's tiny open mouth; the next scene is inside the grape
seeds.stimulus: PERMUTE f007: camera-into-mouth -> scene-into-candy

seeds.text: Peel the giant: giant mango-Raul kneels down and small Raul peels HIM open from the chest seam like a fruit; inside the giant is the next location
seeds.stimulus: PERMUTE giant-eats-Raul -> Raul peels giant

seeds.text: The islands come to her: the Peelerz Islands descend out of the clouds under parachutes and splash down in the cul-de-sac; the destination travels to the talent instead of the talent parachuting to it
seeds.stimulus: PERMUTE parachute beat: talent-to-place -> place-to-talent

seeds.text: The island is the candy: the four talents parachute onto one colossal lychee floating in the sea and peel it together from the top like a landing pad; the finale group activity IS the peel, and inside is the beach
seeds.stimulus: PERMUTE finale: islands-with-candy -> island-is-candy

seeds.text: Assorted staircase: each step of the campus stairs is a different season at night, one per flavor taken from the shared bag, seasons mirrored symmetrically around the step where Liz and John sit; a professor climbs from winter into summer without noticing; shot from inside the open bag
seeds.stimulus: zwicky cast 1

seeds.text: Swap outsides: on the clocktower chime Liz and John swap peels, each wearing the other's outer silhouette like the gummies wear skins, unmistakably themselves underneath; saturated color has weight and sloshes down the tower to pool in the quad where the crews wade
seeds.stimulus: zwicky cast 2

seeds.text: Gravity tilts toward the bag: leaves, moths, streetlight glow and neon color all slide gently toward the open Assorted bag on the steps, color heaviest of all, the bag becoming the new down; handoff = the next scene gets pulled in too
seeds.stimulus: zwicky cast 3

seeds.text: Solid chimes: the clocktower peels open down its seam and its bell rings out solid amber gummy rings that float silently across the hushed quad; nobody reacts; Liz catches one chime on a finger; mirrored split-screen of her side and his
seeds.stimulus: zwicky cast 4

seeds.text: The bag is bigger inside than the campus: from deep inside the shared bag, tiny Liz and John peer down through the bright opening; inside is pastel fog with the fruit islands of the finale floating in it; a dog looks in over the rim; falling into your own snack is the handoff
seeds.stimulus: zwicky cast 5

seeds.text: The late high-five: Raul's arm is a formation of forty little mango guys holding shape, so it arrives half a second late with one straggler catching up; Meg watches the straggler, not the arm
seeds.stimulus: trunk f027; frame beat

seeds.text: Raul becomes the wave: between plays he disassembles entirely and ripples through the crowd as a stadium wave that physically lifts people; he is briefly crowd behavior instead of a body
seeds.stimulus: trunk f027; license: anything the crowd can shape he can be

seeds.text: Giant by headcount: to go giant for the final play the whole stadium has to share the candy; the giant Raul stands up made of thousands of mango guys all cheering in his voice
seeds.stimulus: trunk f027; license: scale costs recruits

seeds.text: The missing minion: the giant's hand has a one-gummy gap because one mango guy stayed behind holding Meg's grape candy for her; the whole giant pauses mid-play and waits for him
seeds.stimulus: trunk f027; license: individuals can defect

seeds.text: Cost and button: at the final whistle the crew disassembles and crowd-surfs the game ball away so Raul never gets his trophy moment; the out-of-tune marching band now plays perfectly because mango guys are inside the instruments
seeds.stimulus: trunk f027; dials event 9 vs Meg 2

seeds.text: New fares: gummy guys hail the grounded Uber driver like a bus and board through his window, paying in curls of candy peel; he keeps the meter running, completely unremarkable
seeds.stimulus: BOX OFFICE: booth window; register f055 f060

seeds.text: Shared-stretch admission: the candy held and stretched between two people is a two-person ticket; Liz and John each hold one end and the snap-back pulls them both into the situation
seeds.stimulus: BOX OFFICE: ticket for two; stretch-not-tear law

seeds.text: Wonder surge: the driver's rideshare app shows a heat map blooming over the neighborhood wherever people peel; he storm-chases the surge for fares, deadpan, wipers on against falling candy sugar
seeds.stimulus: BOX OFFICE: opening-weekend numbers

seeds.text: Queue at the sky: a polite line of neighbors and gummy guys forms at the peeled-back corner of the sky, velvet rope and all, waiting to be let into the dusk Tina opened
seeds.stimulus: BOX OFFICE: the line outside

seeds.text: Rebuilt better: the crews build the carless driver a new car overnight out of gummy panels, a candy replica of his old sedan; NOW SHOWING energy, he pats the hood and it wobbles
seeds.stimulus: BOX OFFICE: sold out / now showing

seeds.text: Street marquee: the streetlights along the block rearrange themselves into a theater marquee arching over the ordinary street while the situation plays underneath; the world advertises itself
seeds.stimulus: BOX OFFICE: marquee

seeds.text: All four worlds lean in: super-wide finale where the asphalt ribbon, the decanted sunset, the funneling stadium and the campus stairs all visibly curve toward the island sea like peel segments around one fruit; the talents were wanted there, not sent
seeds.stimulus: card: Would anybody want it? - desire made literal

seeds.text: The abstainer's bite: the Uber driver, the only person who never ate one, is handed the last candy on the finale beach; everyone and everything waits in Gorilla-length silence; he peels it; end
seeds.stimulus: card: Would anybody want it? - the one who did not

seeds.text: The islands want them: from above, the archipelago quietly rearranges itself into an open-armed bay shape as the four talents approach, the way a dog rearranges itself when its person comes home
seeds.stimulus: card: Would anybody want it? - inverted
